headlines.headline: Grevel Diagnostics announces $4.1B share buyback program

sentiment.reasoning: A $4.1B share buyback program signals management confidence and provides direct support to earnings per share.

headlines.headline: Orevex Renewables warns of supply chain disruptions affecting Central Europe operations

sentiment.reasoning: Supply chain disruptions in a key region pose a direct risk to operational output and revenue targets.

headlines.headline: Strynal Industries raises full-year guidance citing robust demand

sentiment.reasoning: Raising full-year guidance based on robust demand is a strong positive indicator of financial health and growth.

headlines.headline: Orevex Renewables sees 5% margin improvement in latest quarter

sentiment.reasoning: A 5% margin improvement demonstrates successful cost management and operational efficiency gains.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
